user.title: Set up Garden Irrigation
user.description: Select the weather entity used for forecasts (temperature factor and rain veto). Everything else — circuits, notifications, tuning — is configured afterwards via the integration's Configure dialog.

abort.already_configured: Already configured — only one hub is supported.

data.regen_sensor: Rain sensor, mm over the last 24 h (optional)
data.notaus_minuten: Emergency-stop threshold (must exceed every max duration)

benachrichtigungen.title: Notifications
benachrichtigungen.description: Comma-separated notify services, e.g. `notify.mobile_app_phone1, notify.mobile_app_phone2`. Leave empty for no push messages.

tuning.title: Tuning
tuning.description: All defaults come from the proven 4-zone reference system — they work without any changes. Each field is explained below it; to play with the score formula, try the [interactive calculator]({rechner_url}) on the project page.

gewichte.name: Score weights & thresholds
gewichte.description: The score (0–100) blends three factors — soil moisture, temperature/evapotranspiration, days waited — weighted and normalised to the weight sum. The score maps linearly onto each circuit's min–max watering duration.

data_description.score_gewicht_boden: How much dry soil counts. The factor rises 2 points per percentage point below the circuit's veto threshold — circuits without a soil sensor skip it (the other weights take over).
data_description.score_gewicht_temp: How much warm or high-evaporation days count. Choose the source (Tmax or ET₀) in the "Temperature & evapotranspiration" section.
data_description.score_gewicht_tage: How much the wait since the last watering counts — prevents a zone from being starved for weeks in mild weather.
data_description.score_skip_schwelle: If a circuit's daily score is below this, it is skipped today (0 min).
data_description.score_tage_saettigung: After this many days without watering the days factor reaches 100%.

temperatur.name: Temperature & evapotranspiration (ET₀)
temperatur.description: The temperature factor can use the classic maximum temperature (Tmax over the next 3 days) or the estimated reference evapotranspiration ET₀ (Hargreaves) — sun position from latitude + day of year, Tmax/Tmin from the forecast, no extra sensors needed. ET₀ shines for lawns: sunny, dry days evaporate far more than Tmax alone suggests. The current value is in the attributes of `sensor.garten_plan_heute` (et0_mm) — check it before switching.

data_description.score_temp_quelle: Tmax = kit default. ET₀ = evapotranspiration estimate; falls back to Tmax automatically when templow values are missing.
data_description.score_temp_anker: Tmax mode only: at this maximum temperature the factor is 0.
data_description.score_temp_spanne: Tmax mode only: this many degrees above the anchor give factor 100 (default: 100 at 30 °C).
data_description.score_et0_anker: ET₀ mode only: at this evapotranspiration (mm/day) the factor is 0. 2 mm ≈ cool, overcast day.
data_description.score_et0_spanne: ET₀ mode only: this many mm/day above the anchor give factor 100. Default: 100 at 7 mm/day (hot midsummer day).
data_description.score_forecast_typ: daily = your weather integration's daily forecast (default). Use hourly only if it offers no daily forecast.

regen_sonne.name: Rain & sun
regen_sonne.description: Two rain vetoes force the watering duration to 0; the peak-sun lockout defers pot doses during harsh midday sun.

data_description.regen_beobachtet_mm: This much measured rain within 24 h cancels the run. Only active with a configured rain-24h sensor (Global settings).
data_description.regen_forecast_mm: This much rain forecast for today cancels the run.
data_description.strahlung_schwelle: Above this reading of your solar-radiation sensor, pot doses are deferred. Unit = your sensor's; without a sensor it has no effect.

toepfe.name: Pot frequency watering
toepfe.description: Pot/drip circuits get small top-up doses during the day to keep the soil inside its target band. These limits cap frequency and volume — no matter what the sensors report.

data_description.topf_max_dosen: Upper limit per pot circuit and day — also caps the daily water volume.
data_description.topf_dosis_max_min: A single dose never runs longer, however dry the sensor reads.
data_description.topf_min_intervall_min: Wait until the soil has absorbed the previous dose and the sensor has caught up.
data_description.topf_glitch_grenze: Readings below this count as sensor glitches (e.g. 0% on a radio dropout) and never trigger a dose.

kosten.name: Water costs
kosten.description: Only used by the cost sensors of circuits with a flow sensor.

data_description.wasser_tarif: Price per cubic metre of water per your utility.
data_description.waehrung: Display unit of the cost sensors (e.g. EUR, CHF).

data.name: Circuit name
data.bodensensoren: Soil moisture sensors (optional, several = minimum wins)
data.parallel: Run in parallel with other circuits

data.veto_schwelle: Soil veto threshold (moist enough above this)
data.k_faktor: Dose response k (%-points per minute at 50 % soil)

data.name: Circuit name
data.parallel: Run in parallel with other circuits

jetzt_bewaessern.name: Water now
jetzt_bewaessern.description: Starts the planned watering run immediately (skip/vacation vetoes still apply).

not_aus.name: Emergency stop
not_aus.description: Cancels the run and closes all valves with retries.

plan_neu_berechnen.name: Recompute plan
plan_neu_berechnen.description: Recomputes score and today's duration for all zones immediately (incl. pot check).

dosis_geben.name: Give dose
dosis_geben.description: Triggers an immediate pot dose (bypasses score gates, keeps the safety basics).

kreis.name: Zone
kreis.description: Zone ID of the pot zone (e.g. tomaten).
